_comment_relayUrl: URL of the Relay Server for agent-to-wallet communication (env: RELAY_URL)
_comment_dataDir: Directory for storing pairing, contacts, policy, and history data (env: DATA_DIR)
_comment_defaultChain: Default blockchain for operations: base or ethereum (env: DEFAULT_CHAIN)
_comment_chains: Web3 network configuration - Local development environment uses localhost nodes
_comment_pairTimeoutMs: Timeout in ms for pairing code validation requests (env: CLAW_AGENT_PAIR_TIMEOUT_MS)
_comment_relayTimeoutMs: Timeout in ms for general relay requests to Desktop Wallet (env: CLAW_AGENT_RELAY_TIMEOUT_MS)
_comment_signTimeoutMs: Timeout in ms waiting for Desktop Wallet to sign a transaction, includes user approval time (env: CLAW_AGENT_SIGN_TIMEOUT_MS)
_comment_policy: Default policy parameters for transaction approval - higher limits for local testing

policy._comment_perTxLimitUsd: Maximum USD value per single transaction before requiring manual approval
policy._comment_dailyLimitUsd: Maximum total USD value of transactions per day
policy._comment_mode: Policy mode: "supervised" requires whitelist, "autonomous" allows any address within limits
